message:
refactor(parser,svg): extract normalize_identifier to lib.rs and harden SVG font size clamping

fm-parser: Move normalize_identifier() from mermaid_parser.rs to
lib.rs as a public module-level function, reducing mermaid_parser.rs
by ~63 lines and making the identifier normalizer reusable across
parser backends. Fix ir_builder import path.

fm-render-svg: Add NaN/Infinity guard in clamp_font_size() — return
min_font_size.max(1.0) for non-finite candidates instead of passing
NaN through to SVG output. Minor adjustments in defs.rs, document.rs,
and theme.rs.

fm-layout: Minor layout adjustment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
